title: lithocarpus arcaulus
intro: Lithocarpus arcaulus, also known as the Bur Oak, is a species of deciduous tree native to the mountainous regions of China. The bark and leaves of this tree have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus arcaulus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Lithocarpus arcaulus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
